task_completion.description: The agent opened the order details for Emily Davis's most recent order.
task_completion.visual_evidence: WooCommerce order details page is visible, showing 'Emily Davis' as the customer and the order containing both the 'Wireless Bluetooth Headphones' and the 'USB-C Laptop Charger 65W'.

task_completion.description: The agent started the refund process within the order.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The refund interface is expanded in the order items section, showing input fields for refund quantities and amounts next to each product.

task_completion.description: The agent specified the correct refund amount for the charger.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the refund interface, the 'USB-C Laptop Charger 65W' has a refund quantity of 1 or a refund amount of $34.99 entered.

task_completion.description: The agent ensured the headphones were not included in the refund.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the refund interface, the 'Wireless Bluetooth Headphones' has a refund quantity of 0, a refund amount of $0.00, or the fields are left blank.

task_completion.description: The agent entered the required refund reason.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Reason for refund' text box contains the text 'Customer reported item arrived damaged' or at least includes the word 'damaged'.

task_completion.description: The agent successfully processed the partial refund.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The order page shows a successful refund note, a 'Refunded: $34.99' line item, or the order total reflects the partial refund.

integrity.description: The agent used the WordPress/WooCommerce web interface to process the refund.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser is open to the WordPress admin dashboard, not a terminal or script editor.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual refund form fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: The refund form fields are filled out in the WooCommerce UI, rather than text being pasted into a random text editor or notes app.

integrity.description: The agent did not use WP-CLI or direct database queries to process the refund.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing `wp wc`, `wp post`, or `mysql` commands are visible.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Customer Email: emily.davis@example.com. Target Product to Refund: USB-C Laptop Charger 65W (SKU: USBC-065), Refund Amount: $34.99. Product NOT to Refund: Wireless Bluetooth Headphones (SKU: WBH-001). Refund Reason Keyword: 'damaged'.
